headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid HSIC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Henry Schein has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 7.2% to $81.63 per share while the index has gained 6.2%.
